description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a low-top silhouette and a visually striking, multicolored upper. The shoe is predominantly white with overlays of orange, pink, and black abstract patterns, giving it a vibrant, urban aesthetic. The upper appears to be made of a breathable mesh material, reinforced with synthetic overlays for structure and durability. The midsole is thick and textured, likely constructed from EVA foam for cushioning, and features a ribbed design on the sides. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with white laces and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The overall design suggests comfort and style, suitable for casual wear or light athletic activities in urban environments.
description: A colorful, low-top athletic sneaker with a white base, abstract orange and pink patterns, and a thick cushioned sole. Features include a mesh upper, synthetic overlays, and standard white laces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, highlighting the abstract pattern, ribbed midsole, and heel pull tab.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded toe box, mesh upper, and criss-cross lacing.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, emphasizing the colorful overlays and the shoe's overall shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel pull tab, heel counter, and the back of the midsole.
